ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the community program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., recreational, workshop, educational) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the program (e.g., children, adults, seniors) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated program */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event takes place */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time during which the event runs */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizing team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant registering for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration was completed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "event_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event-team association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the event */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team in the event (e.g., organizer, volunteer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated event */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (participant or team) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the participant attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_categories_programs" (
  "program_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_categories_programs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES program_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_categories_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the social media link */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated event */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the event on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
